14],[325,523,1776533711920],[323,523,1776533711935],[323,524,1776533711941],[322,524,1776533711958],[322,525,1776533711970],[321,525,1776533711980],[320,526,1776533711997],[319,526,1776533712002],[318,527,1776533712018],[317,527,1776533712025],[316,528,1776533712033],[316,529,1776533712043],[315,529,1776533712048],[314,530,1776533712057],[313,530,1776533712064],[312,531,1776533712076],[313,530,1776533712089],[313,529,1776533712095],[314,528,1776533712102],[314,527,1776533712110],[315,526,1776533712124],[315,525,1776533712133],[316,524,1776533712146],[317,524,1776533712160],[317,523,1776533712177],[317,522,1776533712191],[318,521,1776533712198],[317,521,1776533712213],[316,521,1776533712227],[315,520,1776533712234],[314,520,1776533712245],[313,519,1776533712253],[312,519,1776533712267],[311,519,1776533712276],[310,518,1776533712283]],"mm-mp":17.644599303135887,"md":[[312,530,1776533712081]],"md-mp":3305.25,"mu":[[312,530,1776533712203]],"mu-mp":3317.75},"v":1,"tc":{}}
